query:
INSERT INTO mirrors_v2
            (host, port, path, kind)
            VALUES
            (?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON CONFLICT
            DO UPDATE SET
              last_seen = unixepoch(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),
              kind = CASE
                WHEN excluded.kind = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE mirrors_v2.kind
              END
            RETURNING id, kind AS "kind!: i64", (first_seen = last_seen) AS "was_inserted!: bool";
